title: Slime Rancher
description: The slime rancher minecraft mod; This mod is all about exploring! Find new biomes, structures and mobs! get new items to help ranch the slimes, and become the richest rancher ever!
body:
The ULTIMATE SLIME RANCHER MOD! <3

This mod is all about exploring the world! Finding slimes, taking care of them, getting upgrades AND GETTING RICH!!!

This mod is in beta so most things are incomplete, But For my 4th release I think i did a mighty good job!
